job_description:
# Data Analyst - Remote
Company: UnitedHealth Group / UnitedHealthcare
Source: Official company careers page
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://careers.unitedhealthgroup.com/job/minnetonka/data-analyst-remote/34088/94451213408

## Highlights
- Posted April 27, 2026; requisition 2357129.
- Supports CXR impact reporting, impact requirements, affected member counts, call volumes, pre/post-impact analysis, structured data management, BI tools, trend analysis, normalization, and data quality.
- Requires 3+ years of data analysis, data storytelling, visualization, large dataset work, Tableau/Power BI/D3, Snowflake, Databricks, SQL, and advanced Excel.
- Remote flexibility within the U.S.; Minneapolis or Washington, DC hires have an office requirement.
strengths: Excellent SQL, data quality, reporting, Power BI/Tableau, Snowflake/Databricks upskilling, and stakeholder analytics overlap.
UnitedHealthcare domain aligns with payer operations and member-facing data accuracy experience.
Large dataset and executive insight requirements map to 100M+ record reconciliation and downstream KPI accuracy work.
gaps: D3JS is not supported by the base resume.
Snowflake and Databricks are presented as current upskilling in the resume; do not overstate production ownership.
notes: Apply first if comfortable positioning Snowflake/Databricks as growing skills. Tailor toward member impact reporting, SQL-driven data quality, Power BI/Tableau, and payer data.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL Reporting Analyst | Data Quality

replacements.find: Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines.
replacements.replace: Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python while applying strong SQL, BI validation, and healthcare data quality experience.
